summary: Project Design Requirements to build a portfolio of 5 lightweight, single-purpose utility web apps (Romaji Converter, RPG Optimizer, DoF Calculator, Recipe Scaler, Cron Generator). The goal is to drive compound traffic through low-competition evergreen search queries and monetize via AdSense RPM.
actors: Developer (Senior Front-End Engineer & SEO Utility Specialist)
Users (Gamers, Photographers, Cooks, Devs, Language Learners)

processes.name: Utility App Development
pain_points: Layout shifts from ads (requires fixed heights)
Complex logic requiring backend (must be 100% client-side)
Slow load times (must be sub-1-second, no CDNs/libraries)
processes.proposed_changes: Implement 'Advanced Options' panels for all apps, ensuring instant real-time updates without page reloads to improve user engagement and utility.
